description: Composition Black shorts for men made of 100% polyester, engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has an in-built inner brief, elasticated waist with a drawstring, meshed panels on the front and back, rubber print on the sides, FCB badge appliquéd on the right hem and nike swoosh appliquéd on the left hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach or dry clean Line dry Cool iron; do not iron on decorations Stylish to a T, these polyester shorts from nike are designed with Dri-Fit technology to keep you fresh and comfortable while you sweat it out at the gym or on the trail. The broad waistband sits snugly, while you can further customise the fit with the drawstring. The in-built briefs offer greater comfort. Team it with Nike Sports tees and shoes for that smart, sporty look.
